description: Regression (#1473): the worktrees are registered under paths that differ from the plan's worktree_template (short `../CommandMate-issue-<n>` vs the templated `../CommandMate-issue-<n>-<slug>`). `commandmate ls` still resolves each by branch, so send/wait/capture, commit detection and baseline verification all cwd into the ls-reported path — the real directory. Both workers commit and verify, both waves advance to success; the old runner used the template path for git operations, found no directory, and silently false-failed the committed worker. `worktrees_present` also resolves by branch, so no missing-worktree limitation is recorded.
